context.summary: Final polishing of GCP infrastructure + SkyPilot training pipeline. Verify all models train on GCP spot, artifact upload works with multipart, spot preemption recovery works, and code is production-grade. ALL tasks in this plan must be completed in this PR — no deferrals.

issue.title: Atomic checkpoint writes for spot safety
Fix MLflow env var on RunPod pods

gpu.name: L4
gpu.notes: Ada Lovelace arch, 50% faster, only $0.16 more

task.title: Verify MLflow artifact upload with GCS multipart
task.description: THE critical test: 910 MB .pth checkpoint must upload successfully via multipart upload through Cloud Run MLflow to GCS. Cloud Run SA: mlflow-server@ with serviceAccountTokenCreator (signing). Client: MLFLOW_ENABLE_PROXY_MULTIPART_UPLOAD=true.
task.success-criteria: - Zero 413 errors (Cloud Run body size limit) - Zero 500 errors (signing/GCS issues) - Zero "Failed to upload" warnings - Checkpoint visible in GCS bucket via gsutil - MLflow UI shows artifacts for the run

task.title: Train sam3_vanilla on GCP T4 spot E2E
task.description: Full E2E: GAR image pull → DVC data → train → MLflow metrics + artifacts

task.title: Train sam3_hybrid on GCP L4 spot
task.description: sam3_hybrid needs ~7.5 GB VRAM → fits L4 (24 GB). Tests larger model. Fixes #710 (val_loss=NaN) if it's a platform issue.

task.title: Train dynunet on GCP T4 spot
task.description: DynUNet is the simplest model. Baseline for cost/time comparison.

task.title: Atomic checkpoint writes (R7)
task.description: trainer.py:802 does direct torch.save() — non-atomic. If spot preempted during write, checkpoint is corrupt. Fix: Write to temp file, then os.rename() to final path.

task.title: Checkpoint SHA256 verification (R8)
task.description: Write SHA256 hash after checkpoint save. Verify before torch.load() on resume. Prevents loading corrupt partial checkpoints after spot preemption.

task.title: Wire check_resume_state_task into train_flow (R14)
task.description: check_resume_state_task at train_flow.py:169 is DEFINED but NEVER CALLED. Wire it into the flow so training resumes from last checkpoint on spot recovery.

task.title: Add MOUNT_CACHED to SkyPilot YAML
task.description: Add GCS bucket mounting with MOUNT_CACHED for checkpoint persistence: file_mounts: /checkpoints: name: minivess-checkpoints, mode: MOUNT_CACHED

task.title: Spot preemption simulation test
task.description: 1. Launch 10-epoch training on GCP spot 2. After ~5 epochs: gcloud compute instances simulate-maintenance-event 3. Verify: SkyPilot recovers → checkpoint loaded → training resumes from epoch 5

task.title: Review + simplify launch_smoke_test.py
task.description: Multi-region launcher is 270 lines with duplicated env var loading. Use /simplify to reduce complexity. Support --cloud gcp natively.

task.title: Deduplicate SkyPilot YAML setup/run blocks
task.description: 5 SkyPilot YAMLs have copy-pasted DVC pull + pre-flight check. Extract to scripts/cloud_setup.sh and scripts/cloud_run.sh.

task.title: Update .env.example with all GCP outputs
task.description: Add MLFLOW_GCP_URI, complete GCS bucket vars, document Cloud Run URL. Ensure all Pulumi outputs are documented.

task.title: Close resolved GitHub issues
task.description: Close: #702 (Pulumi GCP), #687 (GCP account), #685 (evaluate GCP), #681 (Docker providers). Update: #684 (MLflow multipart — based on E2E test result).

task.title: Update CLAUDE.md SkyPilot section for GCP
task.description: Update SkyPilot provider table, add GCP as primary. Document europe-west1 for T4/L4, europe-north1 for MLflow/GCS. Add GPU pricing table.

task.title: Pulumi GCP stack: fix Cloud Run in Pulumi code
task.description: Cloud Run was deployed via gcloud CLI due to Pulumi API issues. Fix the Pulumi code to use dict-based template properly so `pulumi up` handles Cloud Run deployment, not manual gcloud.

task.title: Fix SAM3 FP16 dtype issue (#680)
task.description: sam3_topolora broken by hardcoded FP16 dtype. Fix the adapter to handle mixed precision correctly.

task.title: Train all 5 models on GCP spot
task.description: Verify: dynunet, sam3_vanilla, sam3_hybrid, sam3_topolora, vesselfm all train successfully on GCP spot with artifact uploads. Each model uses appropriate GPU (T4 for small, L4 for medium).

execution-order.step: 1. A1: Wait for definitive E2E test result (running now)
2. A2-A4: If A1 passes, run remaining models
3. B1-B2: Atomic checkpoint + SHA256 (TDD: test first)
6. C4-C6: Close issues + CLAUDE.md + Pulumi fix
9. Commit everything in semantically coherent chunks

commit.message: feat(infra): GCP Pulumi stack — GCS + Cloud SQL + GAR + Cloud Run MLflow
feat(config): add MLFLOW_SERVER_VERSION, GCP vars to .env.example + tests
feat(skypilot): GCP spot training YAML + DVC init fix + multipart upload
feat(checkpoint): atomic writes + SHA256 verification for spot recovery
docs(planning): GCP architecture plans, tutorials, metalearning
refactor(launch): simplify launch_smoke_test.py + deduplicate YAML setup
